raw.subject: Your Pensacola page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Your Friday vibes are infectious, and it's clear you're passionate about helping people achieve their tanning goals!

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be costing you bookings from potential customers who prefer to plan ahead.

I sketched a page idea from your Facebook that highlights your services overview, photo gallery, and contact section.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/aloha-tanning-pensacola

Let's discuss how a simple online presence can make a big difference for local businesses like yours, and I can provide a flat fee for a solution that fits your needs. Would you be open to a quick call to explore further?
